label: Uncomplicated shoulder bruise without fracture or neurovascular red flags
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated shoulder bruise/contusion.
No fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, open wound, infection, neurovascular compromise, high-energy trauma, cardiopulmonary mimic, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, open wound, infection, neurovascular compromise, severe pain, inability to use limb, high-energy trauma, crush injury, compartment syndrome concern, anticoagulation/bleeding risk, unexplained bruising/abuse concern, or cardiac/PE mimic.
Pregnancy/pediatric pathway or specialist-directed orthopedic plan.
must_not_miss: Cardiopulmonary mimic when presentation is not clearly local trauma.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care, sports medicine, or orthopedics if pain, motion, or strength is not improving.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports bruise/contusion framing, local care concepts, and escalation for severe pain, neurovascular symptoms, fracture concern, bleeding risk, or unusual bruising. Autonomous Phase 2101-2200 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated shoulder bruise/contusion without fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, open wound, infection, neurovascular compromise, high-risk trauma, cardiopulmonary mimic, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports bruise/contusion framing, local care concepts, and escalation for severe pain, neurovascular symptoms, fracture concern, bleeding risk, or unusual bruising. Autonomous Phase 2101-2200 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated shoulder bruise/contusion without fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, open wound, infection, neurovascular compromise, high-risk trauma, cardiopulmonary mimic, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated shoulder bruise/contusion
no fracture/dislocation concern, tendon rupture, open wound, infection, neurovascular compromise, high-risk trauma, cardiopulmonary mimic, or specialist-directed plan documented
